what_it_does: Defines a global DNA.iconPack object containing a generated icon composition pack with a library name, defaults, aliases, and custom SVG glyph strings for runtime consumption by a composition resolver.
observations: Generated by engine/build-icons.py and marked do-not-hand-edit.
Attaches g.DNA.iconPack via an IIFE over window.
Pack id is pack.dna.icons and provides.icons has library, defaults, aliases, and custom.
Library is named dna-line; defaults are size 24px, strokeWidth 1.5, color currentColor.
Aliases map file extensions and UI concepts to icon names.
custom contains many inline SVG path strings, almost all with viewBox 0 0 24 24.
The v-mark icon differs: viewBox 0 0 512 512, fill currentColor, stroke none.
Most icons use stroke currentColor and fill none for single-color theming.
standouts: A single large inline dictionary of SVG strings rather than imported assets.
v-mark is the only icon with a 512 viewBox and fill-based rendering.
Aliases include domain mappings such as python/workstation, javascript/browser, yaml/database.
Some icons hardcode white or hex fills despite the currentColor theme model.
conventions: Consistent 24x24 icon coordinate system except for v-mark.
currentColor as the default stroke color for shell-and-sockets single-color theming.
concerns: Hardcoded fill colors (#FBF7EC, #FFFFFF, white) in a few icons break the currentColor single-color model.
Generated file warning means manual fixes should live in the generator, not here.
Relies on a global window.DNA namespace rather than module exports.
No visible validation or sanitization of the inline SVG strings.
notes: A generated runtime icon registry that packages aliases and custom SVG glyphs into one global, theme-aware composition pack.
questions: What component calls resolveIcons(packs) and how does it consume this pack?
Why does v-mark use a 512 viewBox and fill currentColor while the rest use 24x24 stroke currentColor?
Are the hardcoded white/hex fills in adjustments, check-square-fill, checkbox-checked, etc. intentional exceptions?
How is the generator kept in sync with icon additions or edits?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as a generated composition pack consumed by resolveIcons matches the file content; it is a concrete icon pack.
intention_signals: Provide a centralized, themeable, generated icon vocabulary so UI components can resolve icons by name at runtime without importing individual SVG files.
novelty: Treats an entire icon library as one serializable JavaScript object with alias indirection and inline SVG strings, enabling dynamic icon resolution rather than per-component imports.
contribution: A self-contained, theme-aware icon pack data structure with alias indirection and custom glyph definitions that a fused system could keep as its runtime icon dictionary.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a generated IIFE that assigns a global DNA.iconPack object containing the dna-line icon library, defaults, aliases, and custom SVG glyph strings for runtime icon resolution.
intention_for_embedding: It was generated to supply a single currentColor-themed icon composition pack that a composition resolver can consume at runtime.
